initiatives.name: National Network of Abortion Funds
initiatives.description: Network of organizations that help people access and pay for abortions, providing financial assistance and practical support.

initiatives.name: Plan C
initiatives.description: Information about how to access at-home abortion pill options online.

initiatives.name: I Need an A
initiatives.description: Directory of verified abortion clinics, information about financial assistance, and logistical support.

initiatives.name: Brigid Alliance
initiatives.description: We support people nationwide who must travel for abortion care - funding and arranging logistics for transportation, food, lodging, childcare & more.

initiatives.name: Repro Care
initiatives.description: Connects people seeking abortions with community support for practical needs like transportation, lodging, childcare, and emotional support.

initiatives.name: Repro Legal Defense Fund
initiatives.description: Provides legal support and defense funds for people facing criminalization for self-managed abortion.

initiatives.name: Expose Fake Clinics
initiatives.description: Take action with us to make sure no one gets tricked, manipulated, and shamed by anti-abortion fake clinics!
